display_name: Betfair Brazilian Serie B match outcomes
notes:
Brazilian Serie B has £15k-£80k per match matched volume on Betfair Exchange but is
ignored by Western sharp syndicates. Information edge: Portuguese-language press,
regional injury reports, long-travel fatigue (Brazilian distances), referee tendencies.

sources_error.sofascore:
not_implemented: adapter 'Sofascore' is not implemented yet.
  Source role: Sofascore match details (lineups, stats, injuries) via the public web API. Be polite: rate-limit + cache. Source: https://www.sofascore.com/api/v1/.
  Implement quant/adapters/sofascore.py with class signature `fetch(market, source_params) -> DataFrame`.
